name: RaBitQCache: Rotated Binary Quantization for KVCache in Long Context LLM Inference

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: RaBitQCache introduces a novel sparse attention framework using random rotated binary quantization and high-throughput binary-INT4 arithmetic to efficiently estimate attention weights. Its proxy scores serve as an unbiased estimator with theoretical error bounds supporting adaptive Top-p retrieval. The hardware-aware system uses asynchronous pipelining and lazy updates to mask overhead. This approach significantly accelerates inference and reduces memory I/O while maintaining generation quality
